Action callout (bam).description: Insert an inline action callout (skewed comic burst).

Explosion callout (boom).description: Insert an inline explosion callout (jagged star-burst).

Speech bubble.description: Wrap content in a speech bubble.

Thought bubble.description: Wrap content in a thought bubble.

Shout bubble.description: Wrap content in a shout bubble.

Whisper bubble.description: Wrap content in a whisper bubble.

Narration box.description: Wrap content in a narration box.

Section splash slide.description: Add a chapter splash slide; the heading is split on the first colon into a banner and title.

Panel slide.description: Add a single bordered comic panel slide.

Action stage slide.description: Add an action stage slide with centred content.

Explosion stage slide.description: Add an explosion stage slide with centred content.
